mnemonics.title: Two-Phase Warp Reduction Steps
mnemonics.content: SWIRL: Shuffle Within each warp (Phase 1), Inter-warp Results written to shared memory, Load warp sums into warp 0 (Phase 2) -- only 1 sync barrier between phases

mnemonics.title: Warp Shuffle Deltas for Reduction
mnemonics.content: 16-8-4-2-1: Five shuffles to reduce 32 values. Think 'Halving from Half-warp' -- each delta is half the previous, starting from half the warp size (16), producing the sum in lane 0 after 5 steps
